title: clematis colensoi var. rutifolia
intro: Clematis colensoi var. rutifolia, also known as the New Zealand Clematis, is a flowering vine native to New Zealand with fragrant white or pink flowers and a climbing habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clematis colensoi var. rutifolia include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it a useful remedy for wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its safety and efficacy as a medicinal agent have not been extensively scientifically studied.
